originalAlarm.description: 2nd function call argument is an uninitialized value

model:
(define-fun BB_FEATURE_LS_USERNAME () Bool
  false)
(define-fun BB_FEATURE_LS_FILETYPES () Bool
  true)
reasoning: b273d665181.c L16: 'printf("%d", info)' where info is uninitialized (// ERROR). info is declared inside #ifdef BB_FEATURE_LS_FILETYPES (L6-8) but only assigned inside #ifdef BB_FEATURE_LS_USERNAME (L10-12). When FILETYPES=T AND !USERNAME, info is declared but never initialized before use at L16. PC=BB_FEATURE_LS_FILETYPES=T AND BB_FEATURE_LS_USERNAME=F exactly captures this condition. Known bug. Correctly constrained PC.
